description: Orchestrator: interactive menu to pick tools, or install everything at once.

messages.menuTitle: Install All Dev Tools -- Interactive Menu
messages.menuPrompt: Toggle by number (e.g. "2 5 8"), A=all, N=none, Enter=run selected:
messages.dryRunBanner: --- DRY RUN -- no changes will be made ---
messages.dryRunComplete: Dry run complete. {count} script(s) would be executed.

commands.(default): Interactive menu -- pick what to install
commands.-All: Run all enabled scripts without prompting
commands.-DryRun: Show what would be installed without making changes

scripts.name: VSCode Context Menu
scripts.desc: Add/repair VSCode right-click context menu entries

scripts.name: VSCode Settings Sync
scripts.desc: Sync VSCode settings, keybindings, and extensions

scripts.name: Go
scripts.desc: Install Go, configure GOPATH and go env

scripts.name: Node.js
scripts.desc: Install Node.js LTS, configure npm prefix

scripts.name: Python
scripts.desc: Install Python, configure pip user site

scripts.name: Git + LFS + gh
scripts.desc: Install Git, Git LFS, GitHub CLI, configure global settings
